label: A.I. Training & Enablement
title: Practical A.I. education for everyday work.
summary: SIMPLIFAI helps people and smaller businesses use A.I. with confidence through accessible training, plain-language guidance, and practical workflows that reduce friction instead of adding complexity.
summaryHtml: SIMPLIFA.I. helps people and smaller businesses use A.I. with confidence through accessible training, plain-language guidance, and practical workflows that reduce friction instead of adding complexity.
overviewSummary: SIMPLIFAI helps people and smaller businesses use A.I. with confidence through accessible training, plain-language guidance, and practical workflows that reduce friction instead of adding complexity.

overviewCards.title: Who it helps
overviewCards.body: Individuals, teams, and small businesses that want useful A.I. habits without needing to become technical experts.

overviewCards.title: What it offers
items: Practical use cases for everyday operations

overviewCards.title: Why it exists
overviewCards.body: To make A.I. feel approachable, useful, and safe enough to use in real work.

detailsSummary: Each brand serves a distinct purpose while sharing the same foundation: practical technology, clear thinking, and useful outcomes.
finalTitle: Start with the brand that fits the problem.
finalSummary: Whether the need is education, consulting, transformation strategy, or better use of A.I.-enabled time, the work starts with a clear conversation.

label: Consulting & Practical Delivery

label: Time, Focus & A.I.-Enabled Leverage
title: Helping people use reclaimed time with intention.
summary: 25th Hour focuses on the human side of A.I. adoption: what people do with the time, attention, and creative energy that thoughtful automation can give back.
overviewSummary: 25th Hour focuses on the human side of A.I. adoption: what people do with the time, attention, and creative energy that thoughtful automation can give back.

overviewCards.title: Who it helps
overviewCards.body: People and teams interested in using A.I. not just to move faster, but to make better use of their time and attention.

overviewCards.title: Why it exists
overviewCards.body: To keep the purpose of efficiency human: more space for better thinking, better work, and better living.
